author: Nir Reitman
text: Great place to enjoy israelubjibtech vibes. Afternoon brings flicks of thirsty young hivtecjersbdiscuussbg front end loading of beer. Nice and easy going place. Be noted shutting places are common and may be on hide and in rush hour time.

author: Daragh Nener-Lally
text: Busy place, sometimes hard to find a table. Prices are super-reasonable for Tel Aviv... it's one of the few bars where I don't feel I'm being ripped off.

author: Dan H.
text: Great place to sit and relax with friends and a beer on tap. They have a wide variety of beer and other types of alcohol at great prices. A large outdoor seating are gives the place a very casual feeling.

author: Pavel Krigman
text: A great beer garden in tel Aviv, big draft beer variety with amazing prices, you cannot find better prices in the city. Great atmosphere

author: Omri Markovitch
text:
Fast service. Nice sandwiches.
A good verity of beers. With very fair prices. I will definitely go back there.

author: raz abadi
text: Self serving pub!! I really like it. ­ƒì║ beers are very cheap and high quality. Most of the beers costs 18 nis and some 20. The food is ok. At least we ordered. Grilled cheese sandwiches and cheese plate, but it is cheap, 28 nis per one. There are wines on the menu but we didn't order, also 18 nis

author: W. B.
text: Reasonable  prices, unlike other tel Avivian  places. 500ml of beer 19 shekels  1ltr.

author: Ananas
text: Nice hangout for after work drinks. Huge selection of beers and ciders, and decent stuff to snack on. Huge outside seating area near Sarona Market but barely any space inside, so be prepared to swear in the summer.

author: Raz Harel
text:
loved the place, so many beers to choose from and the food was really tasty. and the best part is that its cheep, not only in Tel Aviv standards.
i just wish the bartenders were more service oriented and nicer.

author: Joachim Mathes
text:
Good place to enjoy a nice beer.

Plenty of local and international beers on tap. Snacks available to accompany the beer.

author: Noam Feldman
text: Great atmosphere and good food. I didn't give it 5 stars since the tables were not clean and there was no tray to take out the food

author: Ori Bachar
text:
Self service bar at Sarona area. Lowest prices I saw for beer in Tel Aviv. Food was good as well.
Bit crowded throughout the day but worth it

author: Itay Levy
text: Great place to grab a beer, a wide selection of beers with very fare prices, self service and many seating option

author: Ari
text:
Great place, offers the best price for beer in TLV
Lots of taps as well

author: Nataly Perl
text: Great place to drink draft beer, great music variety. Fun. Can eat something on the way, on a sit down. Not expensive place with a great vibe. Can't wait to get back.

author: Serge Mihalovich
text: Great atmosphere and a wide variety of tap beers. Prices are surprisingly low given the location. Avoid the food.

author: Ofir Geva
text:
A great place for a casual drink an a small snack, or after-work beer.
Good v8bes and young croud.
Might be a little crouded.

author: Marcin Ostrowski
text:
Great selection of tap beers in very nice environment!
Large beer ~ 20 shekels, which is very cheap as for Tel Aviv.

Place is nice and clean, staff is friendly.
And itÔÇÖs just a step from Sarona Market.
They are also serving  some cold and warm ÔÇÿbar foodÔÇÖ if you will not find anything interesting at Sarona or itÔÇÖs too busy.

author: Eitan Pam
text: Not a place to go to eat but to drink. They dont have problem with you bringing food from other places

author: zviki Saffer
text: Service is terrible. Waited in a line for draft beer for over 15 minutes to see the staff working very slowly. They were not trying to move faster

author: Eliran Ben Ezri
text: Reasonable cheap prices, unlike other tel Avivian  places. 500ml of beer 19 shekels for Tuborg, 39  for 1 Ltr of weinstafen!  Specious outside, intimate inside. Perfect bar for dates, friends gathering and great location and view.

author: Alex Berman
text: Very good beer selection at very good prices. The food looks nice as well and not too expensive. Self service - thus the low prices. Recommended if you are in the area - great value.

author: Anna Niman
text: The place is nice, the beers are great, I would give 5 stars, but the vegan burger was so small and poor.. IÔÇÖm frankly  shocked they price it 48 NIS(!)

author: Oren Lavie
text:
Big variaty of beer with great prices.
I took the Cubano sandwich which was excellent.
Very recommended!

author: Roei
text: This is a beer garden where you just come in, order beer or whiskey and the counter and sit down with your friends. The service is minimal and the prices are probably the best in the entire city.

author: Danny Ganelin
text: Great place to a get a good beer for a great price. Self service and usually very packed.

author: Lavi ben-shimol
text: Sit and have a beer kind of place. Great location, and the beer is cold

author: yael keshet
text: The prices are good , the atmosphere is great , one of my favorites pubs in tel aviv

author: Ronnie Lipkin
text: Awesome place, self service, great beer, awesome location- accessible public transportation wise. Prices are the best in town and probably in the country

author: Spencer Tate
text: Such a great spot. Friendly vibes. Great prices.

author: Guy Ronen
text: Must visit place for all beer lovers! Huge amount of beers on tap and bottles. The best prices for draft beer in Tel Aviv.

author: Jenya Vestfrid
text: Great selection of beer and strong alcohol, good music. Love the place

author: M Harisov
text: Shitty service bartender boy started to argue with me about a year the place was opened, shouting and shaming me. I donÔÇÖt think the place worth your time. Two years before i was here three times a week. Now i prefer other places.

author: maria nosarev
text: A great place if you want to sit and drink, without leaving your paycheck at the counter. A scenic place(Sarona) located very comfortably among the skyscrapers and main roads of Tel-Aviv, making it very easy to get to, and from, to have a "Tel-Aviv night out". Nice music, lots of outside sitting(heated too, if winter is your visiting season), for large groups of people too. A great selection of beer, and other alcoholic drinks. Recommend to start your evening with.

author: Amir Shachar
text:
Beer is good, service can be very bad at peak times (waited 20 mins with just 7 people in front of me)
How long does it take to pour a beer??

author: ÎÉÎòÎñÎÖÎ¿ ÎûÎöÎ¿
text: Nice variety of beers, cheap, and good vibes overall.

author: Liz R
text: Great selection of different beers. Friendly prices & staff, snacks, everything a beer lover needs. and the best part, you serve yourself so no need to leave a tip. Will definitely be back

author: Ran Amar
text:
Great place,  the bar has awesome food and a good vibe!
Huge variety of drinks, and you don't wanna miss out on the hot dogs!

author: Dima Kantargi (DimiBoy)
text: As someone who doesn't drink and just came for food with other drinking friends I was happy to see they have food, but the food is average at most and tables seemed not so nice and crowded

author: Dan C
text: Nice and cheap with great selection of beers on tap.cornbeaf sandwich is delicious

author: Yigal
text:
Prices for beer are some of the best in country.
Service is self service which is the best thing you can get, it is a pub not a restaurant.
food side is weak, all sort of small basic dishes, this can be fixed by offering a big bowl of fries ;)
atmosphere is fun, out in the open, under the trees mostly, but sometimes not clean enough.
All in all, great place to sit with co-workers and friends and have beers and shots for decent prices

author: Omer Meister
text: Absolutely the best price to return bar in Tel-Aviv. All of the beers are around 20 shekel, wide variety of beer styles, along with some other liquor options. Ordering and serving is at the bar itself so you don't have to deal with waiting for a waiter or forced tipping (although with their fair prices and kind service, I think they do deserve in this particular place), came back many times and for sure more in the future. Nice music too.

author: Oluwafemi Akintilo
text: They have a wide selection of beers from all over the world!

author: Or Suesskind
text: One of the best places in the area to grab a drink. They offer a large variety of drinks and also some good bar food. Prices are very cheap compared to other bars in Tel Aviv (no happy hour, just great prices anytime)

author: Amir Gutman
text:
One of the best pubs in Tel Aviv area! A big variety of tap and bottle beers! Prices are always happy hour prices!
You can also find a couple of decent dishes to go along with your chosen beer.
This is defiantly a pub worth a visit. Enjoy!

author: Michael Ns
text:
Lovely place
Affordable prices for alcohol
-food wasnÔÇÖt cheap and not yummy at all!

author: ofek pearl
text:
Good selection, not so much for IPA though. Good prices and very good atmosphere. I like the self service concept.
Many outside and some inside seats are available.
Weirdest bathroom I ever seen. It a shared one but the doors won't close properly, what gives with that?

author: Igal Beilin
text: Good beer, good food. Too crowded and bit messy. But you get an authentic "Tel Avivian" experience.

author: Inna G
text:
One of the best places to get a beer and a snack. Prices are reasonable, and there is a great variety of beers to choose from.
The size of the dishes is not too big, but more than enough for the price you pay. And the taste... amazing! 98% of what I ordered is delicious!
It's a self-service place, so take that in mind when you go there....

author: yariv danziger
text: Nice bar with good selection of beer taps and relaxing good 80's music

author: Alon Zusman
text:
Really cool place.
The prices are low for the area. Beers are usually 18Ôé¬ for 1/3, a bit more for a half.
Very good selection.
Also fun small dishes to eat with the bear.

They have a lot of open space to sit and in winter some of the tables are under a cover and heaters.

author: eyal kapon
text:
This is my go-to place for a cheap beer!

The beers are extremely cheap and the variety of beers is just insane. And the service is excellent, from the bartenders to the busboy, they are all efficient and very friendly.

Only probelm is you can't reserve a seat, so finding a table can be quite challenging for some!

author: Matan Y
text:
Great beers, great prices! Large selection of beers, some of them are not common in Tel Aviv pubs.
The food is great as beer side dishes, but they should have more vegetarian options. Currently no vegan food options except for snack packs.

author: Michael Roque
text: I'll be honest, I hate Lager & Ale and just feel lame sitting there. It's a Tel Aviv bar with zero TLV vibes. Its a bar for out of towners who are visiting TLV and know no better places. When someone wants to meet and they suggest this spot, I know they know nothing of the city. Sarona area is generally lame. Anyway, beer prices are pretty decent. I'll give them that.

author: Tom JSF Z
text: Absolutely amazing. I love the concept of no waiters. The atmosphere is very nice and chill, there's good music at an acceptable volume, so you can talk normally and hear your friends. The extensive menu of beer and drinks at reasonable price is the crown jewl though- and with the great food (both for munchies and for a regular snack or small meal) makes Lager and Ale a Winning combination.

author: Gregory Mayzel
text: A wide range of a very cheap beer, tasty snacks. Sometimes it's hard to find a place in the evening, but you can sit on some bench nearby. If you just want beers with your friends - this is a place

author: Shahar Gotshtat
text:
I didn't get the concept of a self-service bar. There aren't any waitress, you have to stand in the line to the bar, order your foods and drinks, pay, wait for a SMS notifying you it's ready and go get your order.
If you want something, you have to be away from your table for a good couple of minutes. Personally, I'd rather speak with the people I came with and enjoy the company.

author: Dolev Shapira
text:
It's a great place to hang out with alcoholic beverages after a hard day at work or meet up with friends over light snacks and drinks.

Pros:
* A wide variety of alcoholic beverages
* Large tables for large groups and small tables
* Great prices

Cons:
* Usually very crowded in the evenings
* No cocktails
* Food that goes along with drinks that's not very filling

Notes:
* You should order your drinks inside and then take a seat to your liking
* There is a non-smoking zone
* Most of the tables are outside, but there are a few tables

author: Itay Stein
text:
Love this place!
Operates on the concept of self serving - there are bartenders but no waiters.
Mostly outdoor sitting, usually enjoys matural shade from nearby buildings. Usually not too crouded.
Very good selection of tap and bottled beers at cheap prices.
1/2 a litre cost between 19-22 nis.
The selection is always changing, and includes premium beers such as brewdog, choufee and more.
They also serve local Israeli bears, such as malka, alexander and negev.
The beer os stored and poured skillfully by nice bartenders.
The food is nice (although there are no fries), I reccomend the cubano sandwich. I believe the food menu has updated since my last visit, and includes fish and chips, arais and more.
People can leave tables dirty and the staff is not too quick to clean them, but you can always ask for table cleanup.

author: Rost Gruner
text: Wow! What a place. Kind of a beer garden , many sort of beers, very cheap and some snacks, you just but your beer and find a place to seat outside, gorgeous view on Sarona and nice company of young people working in nearby hi tech companies. Really cool place to end up a hard working day or a week.

author: Maksim Razumnikov
text:
Self service bar. No sit reservation is possible.
Big choice of beers, for the cheapest price in Tel Aviv.
The food is ok as a side for beer, but you can always go to Sarona market and take some food with you.

author: Pegas Graphics
text:
A posh,overpriced place. Great verity of beers but its self served and has super overpriced food.
Don't touch the papas bravas- undercooked and just not worth it.
When my friend told them about it they didn't even  bothered to apologize just said that's what it is..
The plus point -they have a really tasty mom alcoholic beer that actually tastes like a beer and not root ale.
Not on my recommended list of places..

author: Jonathan Yehie
text: Cheap beers, finger food and chasers. Good beer selection. Honestly what's not to like. Seating is almost all outdoors so a bit annoying when cold. Also only order at the bar. For food you order at the bar and they text you once the food is ready. Not perfect but for the price it's worth it.

author: Ofir Rosilyo
text:
Best place for beer and snacks.
Its self service so if you are not into it this place is not for you. Prices are awesome. Beers are affordable and served cold from the tap. Great place to catch up with friends over a cold brewsky.

author: Dori Yehuda
text: Finally a real selection of both local and foreign beers in Tel Aviv. Great prices, good atmosphere, people looking for a relaxed night and people looking for some excitement will be satisfied by the up beat and young vibe. A strong new entree to the Tel Aviv night scene.

author: Dor Barda
text:
Great beer selection and the cheapest place to get drunk with your friends with good street food.

Update: After all this time, still one of the best pubs in Israel

author: David Raviv
text:
Calm and relaxed atmosphere. Seating outside on large wooden tables or tall small tables with bar seats.
When the place is packed, you can sit on the grass nearby.
Self-service, a large variety of beer.
Reasonable prices.

author: Teddy Lazebnik
text: Cool bar - nice snacks, cold beers ­ƒì║. The workers were super nice and the atmosphere is very Israeli. Like other places around, the price is unrealisticly high.

author: Emma Rose Shapiro
text: The vibes are good and thereÔÇÖs plenty of space. However the bar tenders are not the most pleasant.

author: Amit Arnon (Amitloaf)
text: Great place! Cheap beer and large variety. Be on the lookout for great deals in the bottle section. If you are not vegetarian, nice simple food. If you are, eat before you arrive. Sitting is mostly outside in large wooden tables. There are bathrooms inside. Self service only, no option to reserve tables.

author: Sharon Feldman
text:
it's like standing in the poor  supermarket "fast lane" in middle Netnaya, with a loaf of bread and a milk bottle, when the queue in front of you hardly moved. for this to come to tel Aviv ?
what is the problem to just put a few barmen , and each one will take your order ...
updated to 3 stars because all the young people coming there give it nice groovy atmosphere. its nice, when not many people are  waiting, or when you can find place to seat...

author: Amit Katz
text: Cool place, inexpensive (for Tel Aviv) drinks. Food is good, not inexpensive. No table service, and seating can get pretty limited. The lines get long during peak hours.

author: Vadim Maslikhin
text: Small bar with beautiful terrace in the centre of Sarona. Prices are wonderful for Tel-Aviv, big choice of tap beer and food.

author: Paul Shotts
text: Great beer selection at a reasonable price for central Tel Aviv

author: Yaron Yarden
text: Beer for 20 Shekels in Tel Aviv? Are you kidding me? Run for it! Great selection, great prices, professional service. Highly recommend.

author: Gilad Cohen
text: The place has a very nice atmosphere. It is a self service bar. The down side is that you need to wait in line for your beverage. It is more annoying when it is your second one. Then you need to get up and bring it. The food is not great and they makes a lot of mistakes in your order.

author: or yaacov
text: Cheap beer, not the most fresh, tables are usually dirty, but price per value, this place is definitely worth visiting

author: Erez Segev
text: Nice place, great prices for beer. Keep prices low!!

author: Andrey Byhalenko
text: Good place, but they should add more IPA.

author: Ariel Eden
text: Wonderful atmosphere, very well priced beer (even my Kasteel Rouge was moderately priced) the sandwiches were the best munch you could have with beer. I ordered the cuban sandwich and it was so good my boyfriend copied me. The nachos were fabulous, I loved the creamy but not too heavy cheese sauce. Btw their guacamole is really good it sould be sold on it's own in a toast lol

author: Tomer Cagan
text: Self serve bar. You order your drinks and food (well, snacks - sandwiches, pretzels etc) at the counter. Drinks are served on the spot. For the good you will get an SMS to come and pick it up. There's a large variety beer include several draft beers and a wide selection of bottles. There's also some hard liquor - include good deals on whisky usually. Sitting is outside - on large tables or dinner benches. There's no atmosphere to talk about other than what you and your party will create. Right now with the pandemic going on, it's a good place for a "breather"

author: Georgios Stylianos Karampolas
text: Large variety of beers, friendly staff, great place

author: kobi aflalo
text: The cheapest prices for craft and bottled beer in Tel-aviv. I ordered the coubane sandwich and the hot-dog dish, both were tasty. Highly recommended for drinking and eating.

author: Roie Reuveni
text: Went down since the last time. Not enough bartender's, really not prepared, beer ran out pretty early in the night. They also ran out of most of their food. First time was pretty fun, but this time makes me not want to come back. Feels like amateurs are running the show. Sucks because it was a cool place

author: Ben Fried
text: Around 20 beers on tap, decent finger food. Great vibe with scattered tables and chairs. I go there often with a few friends to hang out in a low key environment.

author: Nick Hill
text: Great bar cheap beer

author: Ilona Fanta
text: Great place, great beer selection. I wasn't huge fan of the snacks though. Actually, I haven't liked anything of what we had. Next time I'll check if it is allowed to bring food there as there is plenty of tasty places nearby.

author: Alex Rosen
text: Many taps with local and international beer, affordable price. Alexander green IPA is recommended. Also a Blue Moon. In spring evening it's nice to sit outside

author: Orili
text: Drinks prices are reasonable for beers but shots are pretty expensive. It's really more of a TA bar, you take your drink and sit at pretty far table so most of the time you can't hear the music or anything.

author: Odi Paneth
text:
A "fast food" concept for beer.

Quality is extremely high, beer is served in the correct temperature, right glassware, tons of choice options, and on top of that, this is *cheap*! , Around 30-50 percent less the anywhere around center tlv.

author: John Birion
text:
Good beer selection at an afordable price. Tasty bar food to go along with it.
No table service, no BS, exactly what the doctor ordered...
This place quickly became one of my favourites.

author: Katya Nudnov
text: Loved the place!!! Extremely nice yard with wooden tables, range variety of beers, but they  also have another drinks. The place is self served, which makes everything faster and the prices are very good.

author: Noam Elsberg
text: Big beer and drinks variety. also nice option to snack on the menu. the place is a self served place and theres no table reservations. nice atmosphere and good pricing. over all a very good choice for a bar to hang out with friens after work

author: Eli E
text:
Cheapest beer in tel aviv.
I wish more place would adopt the concept!
Nobody cares about being served beer when you can pay an actual fair price for it! First time I was served the check I thought I was being scammed cuz it was so cheap! Wish I could give it ten stars

author: Noy Meir
text: Good prices and beer variety, tasty street food

author: Hezi Gabay
text: Five star for the price and the good vibe, most of the itÔÇÖs crowded (for a reason)

author: Alexandra D
text: Really nice bar, with a fun atmosphere, kind service, great variety of beer, tasty food and very low prices. There are no waiters and you pay on the spot, which is very convenient, and probably what allows the place to be inexpensive. Highly recommend!

author: Almog Tlumak
text:
Love this place.
Other than extremely low alcohol prices, the vibe is great, the outdoors is in the beautiful sarona area and thereÔÇÖs a few cute dishes you can order.

author: ori Shavit
text: self service beer garden, nice snacks to go with the beer, a wide assortment of beers on tap. best thing is the price, a 5 beer round was has a change fir 120 or 130 ILS

author: Dima Feldgendler
text: The place is a game changer ­ƒÖî
